article_title: EF Core vs Dapper：.NET 数据访问怎么选
core_theme: EF Core 和 Dapper 不是谁比谁好——它们解决不同抽象层级的问题。文章从性能、查询控制、迁移、学习曲线等维度对比，给出决策矩阵和混合使用模式
reader_takeaway: 获得一个清晰的决策框架：根据项目场景（CRUD、报表、遗留库、复杂领域模型）选出合适的工具或组合
summary_angle: 把「EF Core 擅长领域模型 → Dapper 擅长 SQL 控制 → 混合使用两全其美」做成对照式封面

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 feature comparison table 和 code comparison：EF Core 自动生成 SQL + 迁移 + 变更追踪 vs Dapper 手写 SQL + 零开销
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧代表 EF Core（高抽象、自动化），右侧代表 Dapper（直接、SQL 控制）

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 hybrid approach 和 decision matrix：EF Core 管写入 + Dapper 管读取，共享连接
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央一个融合的「工具箱」，里面 EF 和 Dapper 各司其职

main_metaphor: 一个卡通风格的工具箱对决——EF Core 是一把多功能瑞士军刀（啥都能干但有点重），Dapper 是一把锋利的手术刀（只干一件事但极致快），两者可以放进同一个工具箱
primary_subject: 一个分成两半的工具箱或工作台，左边放大而全的 EF Core 工具，右边放小而精的 Dapper 工具
subject_action: 两个工具从对立到协作，最终放入同一个工具箱
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: American cartoon illustration, elastic shapes, clear expressions, bold color fields, light comedic timing
selected_style_reason: 随机选中（索引 20）；工具对比类内容用卡通风格的夸张对照和明快配色来降低选择焦虑，让「二选一变成各取所长」的结论更易接受
style_safety_note: 使用泛美式卡通风格描述，不涉及特定作品或角色
draft_goal: 第一轮验证：左右对照构图是否清晰、两个工具的视觉区分是否明显
revision_targets: 如果左右区分不够，加强颜色对比
如果卡通感过强，稍微收敛夸张程度
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover comparing EF Core vs Dapper in .NET - two data access tools with different philosophies. EF Core is the full-featured ORM, Dapper is the lightweight micro-ORM. The conclusion: use both where each shines - EF Core for writes/domain, Dapper for reads/reporting.

Summary angle: From 'ORM vs Micro-ORM confrontation' to 'each has its strengths, use both' resolved into a readable cover.
Narrative flow: conflict-to-resolution. Two sides that converge into one toolbox.
Information blocks:
- Contrast: left side representing EF Core (high abstraction, automated), right side representing Dapper (direct SQL control, minimal overhead), labeled with short labels
- Takeaway: a central unified toolbox where both tools coexist harmoniously, labeled with short Chinese text

Main metaphor: A cartoon-style toolbox showdown - EF Core as a versatile Swiss army knife (does everything but heavier), Dapper as a precise scalpel (does one thing extremely well) - both belong in the same toolbox.
Subject: A split workbench or toolbox, left side showing EF Core's comprehensive tools, right side showing Dapper's focused precision tool.
Composition/framing: Left-right contrast converging to center. Keep one dominant focal point.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with American cartoon illustration, elastic shapes, clear expressions, bold color fields, light comedic timing. Stylized, polished, editorial. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: blue-purple, orange-red, white, dark gray.
Visible text policy: allow only 3 short labels. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake terminals.
Avoid: neon cityscapes, cyberpunk, floating chips, code rain, HUD, robots, dashboards, fake terminals, fake charts.
